title: Blood Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Mirai-kuriyama-kyoukai-no-kanata-35829980-600-425.jpg|center|500px]]

==Summary==
'''Blood Manipulation''' is the ability to control and/or modify blood, or the equivalent primary fluid that multicellular organisms utilize. It may be categorized under [[Biological Manipulation]], though there are cases where it is distinct.

==Possible Uses==
Blood may be manipulated in a variety of ways. It can be a simple form of attacking unconventionally via one's own or an opponent's blood. It may be turned into an incapacitating tool towards an opponent by forcing their own blood to damage or otherwise impede them.

Blood may be used as a source of [[Life Manipulation|life force]], especially by supernatural creatures such as vampires. It may be used to [[Biological Manipulation|alter an organism]] on a fundamental level. Frequently, [[Magic|blood magic]] may come up as an extremely potent and taboo kind of magic.

*[[Amon (Legend of Korra)|Amon]] ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender|Avatar: The Legend of Korra]])

*[[Mohg, Lord of Blood]] ([[Elden Ring]])
*[[Ebola Virus]] ([[The Real World]])
